{"name": "DEMOCRACY", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"DEMO\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://t.me/daodemo\\"}]", "description": "DEMO is a decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) that uses blockchain technology to facilitate democratic decision-making. Investors of the DAO can submit proposals for real-world tasks, such as \\"bring a piano and play in front of the people\\", and use a voting system to decide which proposal will win and how many tokens will be rewarded for the task. After the vote is complete, a QR code will be generated containing the task and a link to the address on which the tokens are to be rewarded. Anyone can scan the QR code and complete the task, and if a majority is satisfied that the task has been successfully completed, the tokens will be sent to the address containing the task.\\n\\nTo make the system more secure, DEMO can use a multi-signature wallet system that requires multiple parties to sign off on the transaction before the tokens are released, or use a smart contract system that automatically releases the tokens when certain conditions are met. Furthermore, identity verification protocols can be implemented to ensure that the person completing the task is the same person who submitted the proposal. Finally, DEMO can leverage a reputation system to build trust and ensure that rewards are only given to those who have completed the task satisfactorily."}

Preventing the accumulation and transfer of labor vouchers was either not possible, or required such a powerful and intrusive state that came with overwhelming problems of its own.\\n\\nWe have seen with the rise of cryptocurrency, and especially in Smart Contracts in the EVM ecosystem, solutions that can indeed provide this capability without large amounts of coercion. {"name": "FLAT STANCE DAO", "avatar": "ipfs://QmdzT4jsQ1KWyhTXJcmHZB2jy5bTwmq3pqZCJArZgoFwaJ", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"Discord\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://discord.gg/hvCPyVpV\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Notion\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.notion.so/FLAT-STANCE-ONARICHO-DAO-c0fea4611da34de3a1f1a601d64d17fc\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"X\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://twitter.com/FlatStance\\"}]", "description": "FLAT STANCE ONARICHO DAO の目的・概要\\n\\n空き家問題や環境課題に立ち向かい、人々の多様な豊かさを創出するため、私たちはWeb3技術を核とした革新的なシェアハウスを提案します。このシェアハウスでは、日本の忘れ去られた空間が再び生き返り、持続可能なコミュニティの形成を促進します。分散型の運営モデルを採用し、地域社会との協働を通じて、空き家を再活用することで、居住空間としての価値を再定義します。\\n\\n私たちのビジョンは、ただの居住空間を超えた、次世代の共同生活の実現です。オーナーと入居者が共に創り上げるフラットな運営モデルは、Web3の透明性と共有価値を基盤とし、毎日が革新と共創の旅となります。入居者は、ブロックチェーンを活用した投票システムを通じて、シェアハウスの運営方針から日常の細かなルールまで直接形作ることができ、新たなデモクラシーを体験します。\\n\\nさらに、このシェアハウスは、分散型経済の促進にも寄与します。入居者は共同で価値を創造し、その利益を共有することができるため、単なる居住空間を超えた分散型経済のハブとなる可能性を秘めています。共有、協働、持続可能性を核とする新しいライフスタイルを通じて、物質的な豊かさだけでなく、絆や共同体意識といった新たな価値を享受します。\\n\\nこのシェアハウスの取り組みは、地域社会にも開かれており、地域の活性化に寄与すると同時に、地域住民との新たなつながりを生み出します。Web3がもたらすイノベーションは、不動産業界に新たな標準を確立し、他の社会問題へのソリューションのモデルともなり得ます。このシェアハウスは、空き家問題に対する有効な戦略であり、社会に新たな豊かさをもたらす革新的なアプローチです。"}

{"name": "DAO de Ando-AN", "avatar": "ipfs://QmY7u4XLVezJiSgmbZ9nwv8564fbqCeCrERVFZUzsrs8XU", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"discord\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://discord.gg/zbyuhHjN6s\\"}]", "description": "DAO de Ando-AN は安藤庵が運営するDAOです。\\n\\n母体は、京都府長岡京市にある小さな鍼灸院〈鍼灸カウンセリング治療院安藤庵〉です。\\n\\n活動内容は主に２つあります。\\n\\n１医療村　HOLY VILLAGEの運営\\n２ビール、HIROSHI BEERの製造販売\\n\\n １＜HOLY VILLAGE＞は、主に郊外のある地域に点在する空き家を宿泊施設として運営した、滞在型の＜ホリスティック医療村＞です。\\n\\n一軒一軒の空き家を、点と点をつなぐようなネットワークで運営することでDAO参加者のレイヤーができます。そのレイヤー上には、地方にたくさん存在する郊外の空き家を利用して、さらなるネットワークを構築します。\\n\\n空き家は宿泊施設だけではなく、例えばホリスティック医療の観点からメニューが作られている飲食店の運営なども含まれていますし、複数の治療家が時間差で共有するコアスペースの運営も行います。\\n\\n宿泊施設も、通常のものだけではなく、バイカー専門の宿泊施設なども運営します。\\n\\nまた、ネパールのゴルケ村を、村まるごとホリスティック医療村にしてしまおう！というのもあり、それもHOLY VILLAGEの運営の一つです。\\n\\n２　HIROSHI BEERのヒロシの由来は、農家民宿とりこと舎（や）さんのヒロシさんからいただきました。\\n\\n放置竹林を整備する際に出る、竹林廃棄物を燃料として使い、ビールの製造販売を行います。\\n\\nビールに使う材料は出来る限り自家製になるよう運営していきたいです。\\n\\nまた、排熱を利用した発電や温泉施設の運営なども行います。\\n\\n放置竹林の整備に伴い、良質な筍の栽培などにも今後はすすんでいきたいです。\\n\\n"}

{"name": "MediaRiders Crowdfunding DAO", "avatar": "ipfs://QmWADoY8ZsCXgNKa94CsqHQLbqde6o36qx2kYJTLLzBJF3", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"chatgtp.no\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://chatgtp-no.webnode.page/\\"}]", "description": "Creating a DAO (Decentralized Autonomous Organization) named \\"MediaRiders Crowdfunding DAO\\" with governance structures on the Matic network using Aragon is an exciting endeavor. Below is an outline of the governance structure and a description of its use case:\\n\\n**DAO Name:** MediaRiders Crowdfunding DAO\\n\\n**Governance Structure:**\\n\\n1. **Token Holders**: The DAO will have a native governance token, \\"MRD,\\" which represents voting power within the organization. Token holders will have the ability to propose and vote on various initiatives and decisions.\\n\\n2. **Proposal System**: Members of the DAO can create proposals for different actions, such as fund allocation, project approvals, and rule changes. These proposals will require a certain percentage of votes for approval.\\n\\n3. **Multi-Signature Wallet**: To ensure secure fund management, the DAO will utilize a multi-signature wallet. A predetermined number of key members will need to sign off on any outgoing transactions or fund allocations.\\n\\n4. **Voting Mechanism**: Voting on proposals will be conducted through a decentralized voting mechanism using Aragon's governance tools. Each MRD token holder will have voting power proportional to the number of tokens they hold.\\n\\n5. **Roles and Responsibilities**: The DAO will define specific roles and responsibilities for its members, including administrators, treasurers, and proposal creators. These roles will be essential for efficient governance.\\n\\n**Use Case:**\\n\\nThe primary use case for MediaRiders Crowdfunding DAO is to support and fund media-related projects, content creators, and initiatives within the media industry. The DAO will enable decentralized decision-making and financial support for projects that align with its goals.\\n\\n**Session Description:**\\n\\nA typical session within MediaRiders Crowdfunding DAO would involve the following steps:\\n\\n1. **Proposal Creation**: Any member of the DAO can create a proposal outlining the details of a project, its funding requirements, and the expected outcomes. The proposal will specify the amount of MRD tokens requested.\\n\\n2. **Discussion and Debate**: DAO members will engage in discussions and debates regarding the proposal. This can take place on the DAO's platform, forums, or other communication channels.\\n\\n3. **Voting Period**: A defined voting period will begin during which MRD token holders can cast their votes on the proposal. Members will have the option to vote in favor, against, or abstain.\\n\\n4. **Proposal Approval**: If the proposal garners sufficient support (as determined by the DAO's rules), it will be approved, and the requested funds will be allocated to the project.\\n\\n5. **Execution and Reporting**: The project team will execute the proposed initiative, periodically reporting progress and milestones to the DAO community.\\n\\n6. **Funds Release**: The DAO's multi-signature wallet administrators will release funds to the project as milestones are achieved and based on the DAO's predefined rules.\\n\\n7. **Ongoing Governance**: The DAO will continue to oversee the project, making decisions about adjustments, further funding, or project termination as needed.\\n\\nMediaRiders Crowdfunding DAO serves as a decentralized funding and decision-making platform for the media industry, empowering its members to support and shape innovative media-related projects. Through a transparent and community-driven governance structure, the DAO aims to foster creativity and collaboration within the media sector."}

Members\\n\\n   - Membership is open to anyone interested in contributing to the funding pool.\\n\\n   - Members hold tokens representing their stake in the DAO.\\n\\n2. Tokenomics\\n\\n   - The DAO issues a native token, called OFD (OpenFund Token), which is used for voting and to represent ownership.\\n\\n   - Initial distribution may occur through participation in a launch event, or through contributions of assets to the funding pool.\\n\\n3. Funding Pool\\n\\n   - The DAO accepts contributions in various forms: cryptocurrencies, NFTs, or other digital assets.\\n\\n   - The funding pool is managed transparently on a public blockchain.\\n\\n4. Decision-making Process\\n\\n   - Proposals can be submitted by any member of the DAO for review.\\n\\n   - Proposals can cover projects, grants, or charitable initiatives.\\n\\n   - Voting is done using a quadratic voting mechanism, giving more weight to members with higher stakes.\\n\\n5. Project Evaluation\\n\\n   - Projects are evaluated based on their potential impact, feasibility, and alignment with the DAO's mission.\\n\\n   - Due diligence may be conducted by a designated committee or external experts.\\n\\n6. Allocation of Funds\\n\\n   - Once a proposal is approved, funds are allocated according to the proposal's specifications.\\n\\n   - Transparent records of funding allocations are maintained on the blockchain.\\n\\n7. Reporting and Accountability:\\n\\n   - Recipients of funding are required to provide regular updates on their progress and use of funds.\\n\\n   - The DAO community can review and comment on these reports.\\n\\n8. Governance Upgrades\\n\\n   - The DAO's governance structure can be updated through well-defined upgrade mechanisms, potentially via community votes.\\n\\nExample Use Cases\\n\\n1. Investing in Startups\\n\\n   - OpenFund DAO may choose to invest in promising startups in emerging industries.\\n\\n2. {"name": "PBR", "linksJson": "[]", "description": "White Paper: Gender-Sensitive DAO Remittance Platform\\n\\nAbstract\\nThis DAO Remittance Platform aims to provide an inclusive and gender-sensitive financial ecosystem for migrant workers. The platform facilitates remittances, promotes savings, and offers access to loans while fostering community building and financial literacy. By leveraging decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) principles, this platform ensures transparency, security, and empowerment for all users.\\n\\nExecutive Summary\\nObjective\\nTo provide a transparent, inclusive, and educational remittance platform that caters to the needs of international migrant workers, particularly women. The platform will promote financial inclusion through access to savings and loan services, while also building a supportive community and enhancing financial literacy. \\nProblem Statement\\nMigrant workers often face high fees and inefficiencies in traditional remittance channels. Additionally, these channels do not address the unique needs of women, such as an emphasis on savings, lack of access to emergency funds, and reliance on social networks for financial security. While Decentralized Finance (DeFi) offer promising opportunities, those with low financial literacy face significant barriers to entry. \\nSolution\\nThis platform aims to address these issues by:\\n•\\tOffering low-cost, expedient, and secure remittance services\\n•\\tPromoting savings via an automatic transfer fee \\n•\\tProviding interest-free loans funded by community savings\\n•\\tBuilding a supportive community network \\nThe platform operates as a DAO, ensuring that it evolves based on the community’s needs through transparent governance. \\n\\nIntroduction\\nBackground\\nMigrant workers contribute significantly to their home countries' economies through remittances. However, traditional remittance channels are associated with high fees and high barriers to entry. Moreover, they often lack tailored support for marginalized communities, such as women. \\nMission\\nOur mission is to bridge the gender gap in financial inclusion by ensuring equitable, responsive access to financial resources and opportunities for all members. We aim to empower migrants and their families by providing a secure, affordable, and inclusive remittance platform that supports savings and lending, promotes financial literacy, and fosters community building and pro-social behavior. \\n\\nDAO Platform Overview\\nRemittance Service\\n•\\tLow Fees: The platform leverages blockchain to reduce transaction fees compared to traditional remittance services\\n•\\tSpeed: Transactions are processed quickly, providing near-instant transfers regardless of geographical boundaries\\n•\\tSecurity: Blockchain technology ensures secure, transparent, and tamper-proof transactions\\nSavings Program\\n•\\tAutomated: A “Savings Contribution” will be automatically collected and transferred to a communal wallet per transaction, initially set to 10% of the remittance amount \\nLending Service\\n•\\tLoans: Interest-free loans can be requested by any member, to be voted on and approved by the community \\n•\\tCommunity-Funded: Loans are funded by the pooled savings of the community, promoting a sustainable lending model\\n•\\tAutomated Repayment: Smart contracts ensure automatic loan repayments, reducing the risk of defaults\\nCommunity Network\\n•\\tSupport Groups: Operates as a social network for users to connect, and join or form support groups based on common interests or needs\\n•\\tResource Sharing: The platform enables sharing of valuable resources, both monetary and information-based\\n•\\tGovernance Participation: Users can vote on platform changes and improvements, ensuring the platform evolves to meet the community's needs\\n\\nGovernance Structure\\nDAO Structure\\nThe platform operates as a DAO, allowing users to participate in governance decisions. This decentralized approach ensures that the platform evolves according to the community's needs and maintains transparency in its operations.\\nProposals and Voting System\\n•\\tProposals: Any member can make a proposal, which is then voted on by the community\\n•\\tVoting: Proposals are approved or rejected based on the majority vote of members\\n•\\tOverseer: During the initial stages, an overseer will be designated to ensure proposals and votes are executed correctly and to mediate any conflicts \\n\\nMembers \\nMembership will be invite-based during the pilot stage, and will focus on international migrants, particularly women. Members will be encouraged to actively participate in the platform’s activities and governance. They must comply with the platform’s rules and regulations to maintain a safe and supportive environment. \\n\\nVision\\nIn the developmental phase, we will deploy the core features of this platform, ensuring the sound operation of the remittance, savings, and lending services. \\nIn the mid-term, our goals are as below.\\n•\\tEducational Resources: Offer tutorials, articles, webinars and workshops on financial management, savings, and investments\\n•\\tExpand Partnerships: Collaborate with financial experts and NGOs to enhance services\\n•\\tMobile Accessibility: Develop a mobile app to increase accessibility and convenience for users\\n•\\tEnhanced Security: Continuously improve security measures to protect users' funds and data\\nOur long-term vision is to become a model financial platform for migrant workers worldwide, promoting financial inclusion, empowerment, and community support. The platform aims to continuously evolve based on user engagement, further facilitating the informed financial decision-making of its members.\\n\\nConclusion\\nThe DAO Remittance Platform aims to address gender differences in the way marginalized migrant workers, especially women, manage their finances. By providing affordable remittance services, promoting savings, offering accessible loans, and fostering a supportive community, this platform empowers users to achieve financial independence and security. The DAO governance model ensures that the platform evolves according to the needs of its users, promoting transparency and inclusivity in all its operations."}

{"name": "CuzzCoin DAO", "avatar": "https://aragon-1.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmWsgp7Dq9Y5sGTcUtinuC1wRf4eZEcftYZvbzEBrNegdt", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"Website\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.cuzzcoin.com\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Instagram\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.instagram.com/cuzzcoin\\"}]", "description": "CuzzCoin is not merely a cryptocurrency; it’s a transformative social initiative aimed at uplifting and revitalizing inner and economically lower communities through financial inclusion and education. Originating from a colloquial term for “cousin,” CuzzCoin redefines “Cuzz” to embody community support and cohesion, moving beyond its misunderstood association with gang affiliations. Our mission is to harness the potential of CuzzCoin to foster a robust community-based economy.\\n\\nWe are set to launch an ambitious program where 30 million CuzzCoins will be distributed among residents of Los Angeles, targeting communities that have traditionally been underserved financially. This initiative is designed to introduce community members to the burgeoning world of digital currencies, educating them on the benefits and functionalities of cryptocurrencies while promoting a culture of mutual support and economic cooperation.\\n\\nThe core idea is simple yet powerful: every holder of CuzzCoin will be encouraged to use their coins to purchase goods and services within the community. This internal circulation is expected to not only boost the local economy but also enhance the utility and consequently the value of CuzzCoin. As the community’s engagement with CuzzCoin grows, and as more services and products are exchanged via this currency, its value is anticipated to rise. This, in turn, will benefit all holders, providing them with an appreciating asset that enhances their financial empowerment.\\n\\nMoreover, CuzzCoin aims to create a self-sustaining ecosystem where the increase in the currency’s value directly translates to increased wealth for the community members. This model not only promotes financial literacy and empowerment but also serves as a catalyst for community-driven economic development and social change.\\n\\nIn essence, CuzzCoin is more than just a cryptocurrency. It is a tool for social change, aimed at empowering communities by providing them with the knowledge and means to thrive in the digital economy. Through CuzzCoin, we envision creating a network of economically empowered individuals who contribute to and benefit from a thriving, self-sustaining economic ecosystem."}

{"name": "Azvada DAO LLC", "avatar": "https://aragon-1.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmPuu8iqpxNr2T9JEr3rzZaJK9cDZbCxp3NLZpoQzcyX7Z", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"Azvada Website\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.azvada.com\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"X (Twitter)\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://x.com/azvadacom\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Discord\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://discord.gg/62er5RyYk6\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Telegram\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://t.me/azvadacom\\"}]", "description": "Holding AZVADADAO tokens grants you participation in the Azvada DAO, leveraging blockchain technology to ensure transactional integrity and transparency. The Azvada DAO employs a voting and governance smart contract on the Polygon network, streamlining business operations and facilitating democratic decision-making among shareholders. This gives you voting rights on business and operational decisions.\\n\\nThe Azvada DAO Treasury is a critical component, acting as the financial hub for the decentralized organization and the cornerstone of Azvada’s business model. It stores and manages the collective funds of the DAO, allowing members to propose and vote on fund allocation in alignment with the organization’s goals. Operating transparently on smart contracts, the treasury ensures security and adherence to governance rules. This enables democratic and efficient resource management, funding activities that benefit the AZVADA utility token and business, such as exchange listings, liquidity provision, market-making fees, marketing, rewarding contributors, and covering operational expenses. Essentially, the DAO Treasury supports the financial activities and growth of the Azvada DAO.\\n\\nAzvada DAO members influence key business decisions, including proposals for adding new members, token burns, fund allocation, and future revenue distribution. This approach empowers shareholders by giving them a voice in the company’s direction. Voting rights are proportional to token holdings, ensuring democratic decision-making. Members can propose and vote on various applications of treasury funds, from marketing initiatives to liquidity provision. Community members are eligible for exclusive rewards for their contributions and active participation in the DAO, ensuring that funds are utilized in the community’s best interest.\\n\\nVoting power is directly proportional to the number of tokens held, with one token equaling one vote. A minimum of one AZVADADAO token is required to vote, and holding 5,000 or more tokens allows a member to make proposals. For a proposal to pass, more than 50% of the tokens that voted must support it, and at least 15% of the total token supply must participate. The minimum vote duration is one day. Proposals and votes must be announced in the Azvada Discord server at least three days in advance to allow for community discussion."}

Through CuzzCoin, we envision creating a network of economically empowered individuals who contribute to and benefit from a thriving, self-sustaining economic ecosystem."}

{"name": "Azvada DAO LLC", "avatar": "ipfs://QmPuu8iqpxNr2T9JEr3rzZaJK9cDZbCxp3NLZpoQzcyX7Z", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"Azvada Website\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.azvada.com\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Discord\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://discord.com/invite/EMfWvY4V3V\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Telegram\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://t.me/azvadacom\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Twitter\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://twitter.com/azvadacom\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Marketplace\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://platform.azvada.com\\"}]", "description": "Holding AZVADADAO tokens grants you participation in the Azvada DAO, leveraging blockchain technology to ensure transactional integrity and transparency. For a proposal to pass, more than 50% of the tokens that voted must support it, and at least 15% of the total token supply must participate. The minimum vote duration is one day. {"name": " ETA Green Energy SVT ", "avatar": "ipfs://QmaME9tSWrHmWESDuLkqNHWQkeszWXyFAiYNizx34Jgwfj", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"eaodao SUB-DAO ETA Green Energy SVT\\",\\"url\\":\\"http://eaodao.webnode.page/\\"}]", "description": "Executive Summary\\nETA Green Energy SVP DAO is a specialized Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) created under the parent Environmental Truth Advocates (ETA) DAO. Its primary goal is to manage securitized assets and investments in renewable energy projects, such as solar, wind, and free energy technologies, through the issuance of Securitized Value Tokens (SVT). This DAO provides a secure, transparent platform for accredited investors to participate in high-impact, eco-friendly projects, while isolating financial risks from the parent DAO.\\n\\nThe SVP DAO operates independently from ETA DAO, with its own governance and decision-making processes, while still adhering to the broader mission of advancing sustainable infrastructure and green energy solutions.\\n\\nPurpose and Objectives\\nThe ETA Green Energy SVP DAO serves the following purposes:\\n\\nInvestment and Loan Management:\\n\\nManage securitized assets using SVT tokens, representing loans and collateralized investments.\\nAllow accredited investors to participate in funding renewable energy projects through decentralized, transparent processes.\\nRisk Isolation:\\n\\nThe SVP DAO isolates financial risks from the ETA DAO, ensuring that the failure or success of individual projects does not directly impact the broader mission of the parent DAO.\\nDecentralized Governance:\\n\\nGovernance within the SVP DAO is facilitated through $ETA Governance Tokens, where holders can vote on loan approvals, project funding, and strategic decisions related to renewable energy investments.\\nCrowdfunding and Project Funding:\\n\\nSVT tokens serve as the primary currency for funding renewable energy initiatives such as solar farms, wind energy projects, and free energy research hubs. Token holders can participate in profit-sharing through successful projects.\\nSVP DAO Governance Model\\nGovernance Token ($ETA):\\n\\n$ETA tokens enable holders to vote on project approvals, budget allocations, and operational decisions within the SVP DAO.\\nVoting Rights: Long-term holders with staked $ETA tokens have greater influence over decisions, promoting responsible governance.\\nSVT Token Utility:\\n\\nSVT Tokens are issued for every securitized loan or project. Investors receive SVT tokens in exchange for backing projects and loans. These tokens can be traded or used to participate in the governance of the project.\\nAutonomous Decision-Making:\\n\\nThe SVP DAO operates independently of ETA DAO in terms of funding allocation, investment decisions, and loan management.\\nSub-DAO Structure:\\n\\nThe SVP DAO operates under a sub-DAO model, with its own governance framework, ensuring autonomy from ETA DAO while maintaining alignment with its sustainability mission.\\nTokenomics Overview\\nGovernance Token ($ETA):\\n\\nTotal Supply: 100 million $ETA tokens.\\nUtility: Governance rights within the SVP and ETA DAOs.\\nDistribution:\\nPublic Sale: 40% available for the public to fund projects.\\nDAO Treasury: 20% reserved for future initiatives.\\nFounding Team: 15%, with a 4-year vesting schedule.\\nCommunity Incentives: 10% rewards for active participation.\\nPartnerships & Ecosystem Development: 10% for collaboration with green tech firms.\\nLiquidity Reserve: 5% for market stability.\\nUtility Token (SVT):\\n\\nTotal Supply: 400 million SVT tokens.\\nUtility: Used for staking, project funding, transaction fees, and profit-sharing within the SVP DAO.\\nStaking: Holders can stake SVT tokens to back renewable energy projects, earning rewards as projects succeed.\\nBurn Mechanism: SVT tokens will be burned based on project success metrics, reducing the supply and supporting long-term value.\\nRevenue Streams\\nCrowdfunded Projects:\\n\\nRevenue generated from completed renewable energy projects, such as wind farms or free energy devices, will be distributed to SVT and $ETA token holders.\\nPartnerships:\\n\\nCollaborations with green tech companies, governments, and NGOs will generate additional revenue for the SVP DAO, which will flow back into project funding.\\nEco-Marketplace Fees:\\n\\nA small fee is collected from transactions in the Eco-Marketplace, where participants trade eco-friendly products or NFTs, contributing to future project funding.\\nRisk Mitigation\\nRisk Isolation:\\n\\nThe SVP DAO structure isolates the financial risks of each renewable energy project. The failure of individual projects does not impact the parent ETA DAO or other projects.\\nTransparent Smart Contracts:\\n\\nAll transactions, loans, and voting are handled through smart contracts on the blockchain, ensuring full transparency and immutability.\\nDecentralized Governance:\\n\\nDecisions on capital deployment and project selection are controlled by $ETA token holders, ensuring a democratic approach to investment.\\nImplementation Plan\\nDeployment of the SVP DAO:\\n\\nThe ETA Green Energy SVP DAO will be deployed as a separate entity from the ETA DAO on the Ethereum blockchain, using the addresses specified.\\nInvestor Onboarding:\\n\\nAccredited investors will be onboarded through a KYC process, allowing them to participate in project funding and governance within the SVP DAO.\\nGovernance and Voting:\\n\\nThe $ETA token holders will begin governing the approval of loans, funding of projects, and distribution of SVT tokens to accredited investors.\\nAudit and Security:\\n\\nThe SVP DAO smart contract will undergo a security audit before launch to ensure its functionality and security.\\nConclusion\\nThe ETA Green Energy SVP DAO provides a decentralized, transparent, and secure platform for managing investments in renewable energy projects. By utilizing SVT tokens and decentralized governance, the SVP DAO ensures that accredited investors can participate in impactful projects while isolating financial risks from the parent organization.\\n\\nWe seek approval to launch the ETA Green Energy SVP DAO as a distinct subsidiary from ETA DAO, providing autonomy, security, and sustainable development in the renewable energy sector.\\n\\n"}

{"name": "DAO 4i", "avatar": "ipfs://QmZRAkHaZw5dupaqWhWujZCTqqYjd1jv7hnLp8wUR6ezY8", "linksJson": "[{\\"name\\":\\"Website\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://gestao4i.com.br/\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"Instagram\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.instagram.com/gestao4i/\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"YouTube\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.youtube.com/@gestao4i\\"},{\\"name\\":\\"LinkedIn\\",\\"url\\":\\"https://www.linkedin.com/company/gestao4i\\"}]", "description": "**Política de Governança da DAO 4i - Tokenização da Gestão 4i**\\n\\n**Visão Geral:**\\nA DAO da Gestão 4i é uma Organização Autônoma Descentralizada que representa 49% da empresa Gestão 4i, uma boutique de fusões e aquisições (M&A) que realizou uma abertura de capital no formato de \\"Hot Issue\\" no blockchain. Esta política de governança estabelece os princípios e processos pelos quais a DAO 4i será gerida e operada.\\n\\n**Membros da DAO:**\\n1. A adesão à DAO 4i é aberta a qualquer pessoa interessada em contribuir para a missão e objetivos da organização.\\n2. Para se tornar um membro, os interessados devem cumprir os requisitos especificados no contrato inteligente da DAO 4i.\\n3. Cada membro tem o direito de propor, votar e participar de discussões sobre assuntos relacionados à DAO 4i.\\n\\n**Tomada de Decisões e Veto Minoritário:**\\n1. As decisões estratégicas e operacionais da DAO 4i serão tomadas por meio de votações entre os membros.\\n2. Cada membro tem direito a um voto por questão em votação. Este voto é atribuído de forma proporcional aos tokens adquiridos, seguindo o princípio de semelhança a ações ordinárias, sem preferência por dividendos.\\n3. A votação será realizada por meio do contrato inteligente da DAO 4i na blockchain, garantindo transparência e imutabilidade.\\n4. Para decisões significativas, como alterações na missão ou diretrizes gerais, pode ser necessária uma maioria qualificada para aprovação.\\n5. É importante observar que, em algumas situações, a opinião de membros minoritários pode ser vetada pelo conselho administrativo da DAO 4i, especialmente em casos em que essa opinião possa ter impacto desproporcional nas operações ou no cumprimento dos objetivos da organização.\\n\\n**Propostas e Discussões:**\\n1. Qualquer membro pode apresentar uma proposta para discussão e votação.\\n2. As propostas devem ser detalhadas e incluir justificativas claras para facilitar uma decisão informada.\\n3. As discussões podem ocorrer em fóruns online, plataformas de comunicação ou outros meios definidos pela DAO 4i. Além disso, a Gestão 4i manterá uma plataforma eletrônica dedicada às Relações com Investidores (RI) para manter uma relação transparente com os investidores. Essa plataforma estará disponível no nosso site gestao4i.com.br.\\n\\n**Comitês e Responsabilidades:**\\n1. A DAO 4i pode estabelecer comitês ou grupos de trabalho para lidar com questões específicas ou projetos.\\n2. A composição, responsabilidades e tomada de decisões desses comitês serão definidos de acordo com as necessidades e regulamentos da DAO.\\n\\n**Transparência e Prestação de Contas:**\\n1. A DAO 4i se compromete a operar com transparência, fornecendo informações sobre suas atividades, finanças e decisões aos membros.\\n2. Relatórios regulares serão disponibilizados a todos os membros para garantir uma prestação de contas adequada.\\n\\n**Alterações na Política de Governança:**\\n1. Alterações nesta política de governança podem ser propostas por qualquer membro e serão votadas seguindo os procedimentos estabelecidos para decisões significativas.\\n\\n**Conclusão:**\\nEsta política de governança estabelece a estrutura básica para a operação da DAO da Gestão 4i, uma tokenização que representa 49% da empresa Gestão 4i, uma boutique de M&A que realizou uma abertura de capital no formato de \\"Hot Issue\\" no blockchain. Ela visa promover a participação ativa, a colaboração e a eficácia na busca dos objetivos da organização. Todos os membros são incentivados a contribuir de maneira significativa e a respeitar os princípios estabelecidos nesta política.\\n\\n---\\n\\nA atribuição de votos de acordo com a propriedade de tokens adquiridos, de maneira semelhante a ações ordinárias, sem preferência por dividendos, fortalece a representatividade dos membros na tomada de decisões da DAO 4i. Essa abordagem contribui para uma gestão mais democrática e transparente, alinhada aos princípios da organização. Como sempre, recomendo buscar aconselhamento legal e regulatório para garantir que as práticas adotadas estejam em conformidade com as leis e regulamentos aplicáveis."}

This shift not only benefits creators but also offers consumers a wider array of content choices, free from corporate influence.\\n\\n 7. Bridging the Gap Between Crypto and Traditional Payments\\n\\nWhile the cryptocurrency market continues to grow, not all potential users are familiar with or comfortable using crypto. Sporus bridges this gap by supporting both cryptocurrency and traditional payment methods. This flexibility allows a broader range of users to participate in the ecosystem, supporting their favorite creators without needing to navigate the complexities of cryptocurrency transactions.\\n\\n 8. Enabling a Subscription-Based Model with Fair Distribution\\n\\nFor creators who prefer a steady income model, Sporus offers a subscription-based option. Subscribers can access a range of content from different creators, and earnings are distributed fairly, based on a weighted system that considers engagement and consumption metrics. This model ensures that all participating creators are fairly compensated, promoting consistent and sustainable income streams.\\n\\n 9. Leveraging Blockchain for Transparency and Trust\\n\\nOne of the core strengths of Sporus lies in its use of blockchain technology to enhance transparency and trust. All transactions and content management activities are recorded on an immutable ledger, ensuring accountability and preventing manipulation. This level of transparency is crucial in building trust among creators and users, making Sporus a reliable platform in an era where trust in digital services is paramount.\\n\\n 10. Preparing for a Decentralized Future\\n\\nAs the world moves towards decentralized technologies and platforms, Sporus is positioned at the forefront of this shift. This future-proof approach ensures that Sporus will remain relevant and valuable as the digital landscape continues to evolve.\\n"}

Isso proporciona uma garantia fixa e uma camada adicional de segurança para todos os que investirem em nosso projeto.\\n\\nEsta adição destaca a estabilidade proporcionada pelos STABLECOINS, que são tokens de energia limpa, e enfatiza que os investidores não enfrentarão perdas devido a flutuações no valor desses tokens, enquanto também contribuem para um mundo mais limpo e sustentável.\\n\\nTransparência\\n\\nReconhecemos os possíveis obstáculos e desafios que podem surgir durante o desenvolvimento do projeto e reforçamos nosso compromisso com a transparência e resolução de problemas.\\n\\nSeja Parte Disso\\n\\nConvidamos investidores a se unirem a nós nesta jornada única, destacando como seu apoio pode ajudar a tornar o IFC Soccer Champions uma realidade e uma referência no mundo do futebol.\\n\\n\\"Adentre uma Oportunidade Única de Investimento que redefine os limites do futebol e da tecnologia. {"name": "Japan Sky ✈︎ 日本の空を、日本の翼で。｜Empowering Japan's Skies with Japan's Wings", "avatar": "ipfs://QmZ4GquCDVruVCWn2oP9GExLeqbqMrLJ4aF4FiSgzycXrG", "linksJson": "[]", "description": "「日本の空を、日本の翼で。」\\n\\n私たちJapan Sky DAOは、航空産業における日本の自立性を取り戻すことを目指します。\\n\\n国産航空機の開発・製造から、自動運転技術の実装、そして航空インフラの整備まで、次世代の包括的な航空エコシステムの構築に取り組んでいます。\\n\\nこのDAOを通じて、航空業界従事者、航空技術者、投資家、航空関連企業、そして航空産業に関心を持つすべての人々が力を合わせ、自律飛行を含む革新的な日本の航空産業の未来を共に創造していきます。\\n\\n--------------------------------------------\\n\\n\\"Empowering Japan's Skies with Japan's Wings\\"\\n\\nWe, Japan Sky DAO, strive to restore Japan's autonomy in the aerospace industry.\\n\\nFrom developing and manufacturing domestic aircraft to implementing autonomous flight technologies and establishing aviation infrastructure, we are committed to building a next-generation comprehensive aerospace ecosystem.\\n\\nThrough this DAO, aviation industry professionals, aerospace engineers, investors, aviation-related companies, and all those interested in the aerospace industry will join forces to co-create the future of Japan's aviation industry, including autonomous flight innovations."}

{"name": "KÄNDER｜Kendo:  A new-age fellowship of sword seekers in pursuit of truth｜剣道：刀の真理を求める者が集う、新時代の結社", "avatar": "ipfs://QmPAFkUYanLfJhwQ9TE3RzEpA4GiR83qjuE1qUQJqfWtGw", "linksJson": "[]", "description": "\\"To Those Who Seek the Way of Kendo\\"\\n\\nWe are a community of practitioners who earnestly pursue the way of the sword—a timeless path handed down through the ages and transcending national boundaries.\\n\\nWith the eternal truths of tradition in our hearts, we strive to practice and evolve Kendo in a manner that reflects the spirit of this new era.\\n\\nWhat We Cherish:\\n\\nHarmony of Mind, Technique, and Body\\nKendo is not merely about victory or defeat, but a journey to elevate one’s humanity through the refinement of spirit, technique, and physical self.\\n\\nFreedom of Exploration\\nThe courage to seek truth, unbound by conventional forms or preconceptions.\\n\\nMutual Respect\\nA mindset of learning and growing together, beyond nationality, school, or status.\\n\\nCultural Heritage and Innovation\\nPreserving the essence of Japanese martial arts while creatively adapting it to the modern world.\\n\\nGlobal Connections\\nFostering bonds with like-minded practitioners across the globe.\\n\\n\\nThis community aims to forge new horizons in Kendo by uniting the experience and wisdom of each practitioner.\\n\\nWe call upon kendoka worldwide who pursue the way of the sword with sincere hearts, free from institutional or organizational constraints, to join this new endeavor.\\n\\nLet us move forward together, guided by the spirit within your sword.\\n\\nShall we explore the depths of Kendo together?\\n\\n----------------------------------------\\n\\n「武の道を求める者たちへ」\\n\\n私たちは、古来より受け継がれてきた剣の道を、国境を超えて真摯に探求する者たちの集いです。\\n\\n伝統の中に息づく真理を胸に、新しい時代にふさわしい形で剣道を実践し、発展させることを目指します。\\n\\n私たちが大切にするもの：\\n\\n- 心技体の調和 - 剣道は単なる勝負ではなく、心と技と体を磨き上げ、人間性を高める道である\\n- 自由な探求 - 型にとらわれず、真理を追い求める精神\\n- 相互の尊重 - 国籍、流派、立場を超えて、共に学び合う姿勢\\n- 文化の継承と革新 - 日本の武道精神を理解し、現代に活かす創造性\\n- グローバルなつながり - 世界中の志を同じくする者との絆\\n\\nこのコミュニティは、それぞれの剣士が持つ経験と叡智を活かし、共に剣道の新たな地平を切り拓くことを目指します。\\n\\n制度や組織の枠にとらわれず、真摯な心で剣の道を追求する世界中の剣士たちに、この新しい試みへの参加を呼びかけます。\\n\\nあなたの剣に込められた想いと共に、私たちは歩みを進めていきたい。\\n\\n共に剣の道を究めようではありませんか！"}
